subcodes.first_line: Your numerous letters were received, and due to the severity of the tempest of trials there was a delay in reply. In brief, it is this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکاتیب منعدده شما رسید و از شدت طوفان بلا در جواب تاخیر افتاد مختصر اینست که
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation
